subcodes.first_line: Lo! The leaves do speak: "The Luminary of the horizons hath appeared!" And the trees cry out: "The Chosen One hath been made manifest!" And the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الاوراق تنطق قد ظهر نیر الافاق و الاشجار تنادی قد ظهر المختار و السماء
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @proclamation to the people of the world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
